nodes.name: Prepare Products
nodes.notes: Add metadata and Phase 6 fields (image_urls, video_urls, vendor_id, source_tier)

nodes.name: Batch Products (50)
nodes.notes: Process 50 products at a time for efficiency

nodes.name: Check if SKU Exists
nodes.notes: Query product_data table for existing SKU

nodes.name: SKU Not Found?
nodes.notes: Check if SKU doesn't exist (error means not found)

nodes.name: Check if Newer Data
nodes.notes: Compare timestamps to see if update is needed

nodes.name: Should Update?
nodes.notes: Only update if data is newer

nodes.name: Update Existing Product
nodes.notes: Update existing product with newer data

nodes.name: Merge Back to Batch
nodes.notes: Send results back to batch loop
